title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals was expected to beat earnings estimates heading into its Q3 2023 earnings report. The Most Accurate Estimate was higher than the Zacks Consensus Estimate, suggesting that analysts had recently become bullish on the company's earnings prospects, resulting in an Earnings ESP of +6.76%. This positive ESP indicated that Acadia would most likely beat the consensus EPS estimate. The bullish outlook reflected investor confidence in DAYBUE's early uptake following its 2023 FDA approval and NUPLAZID's steady growth. Market conditions had improved significantly since early 2022, with investor appetite for quality biopharmaceutical companies returning. Multiple analysts maintained Buy ratings on the stock heading into Q3 2023 earnings.
